meaning: n.杰出的人adj.出色的,杰出的
examples: Perhaps the standout piece from Visvim's A/W '11 collection is the Hadrian jacket in light brown corduroy.
At least my skin wouldn't be a standout here.
The expression, angle and textures all make it a standout.
Asia is a particular standout, due to its experience with the SARS virus in 2003.
But even with those standout successes, another decade passed before craft brewing really took off.
